plugins.photosPermission: Allow Moto to access your photos to set your profile and bike photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Moto to use the camera to take profile and bike photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Moto to use your location to share your position with your ride group on the live map.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Moto to use your location in the background so your ride group can still see you while your screen is off.
